message:
feat(br-1y8ym): wire maintenance module into all server paths + config + CLI handler

Complete the archive maintenance feature:
- Add archive_maintenance_enabled / archive_maintenance_interval_secs to Config
- Wire maintenance::start/shutdown in stdio, HTTP, and TUI startup/shutdown paths
- Add am doctor pack-archive CLI handler using resolve_archive_git_dir

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
